target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible evidence shows extensive facade damage with large sections missing; multiple floors exhibit collapsed or missing balconies and windows; structural integrity appears compromised with leaning and partial collapse; damage covers more than 45% of visible target element area.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Visible extensive damage to facade and balconies; large sections of exterior walls missing; structural elements appear compromised; damage exceeds 45% of visible target area consistent with severe damage definition.

summary: Two buildings assessed: one with SEVERE damage (bounding box 406,485,811,932) and another with SEVERE DAMAGE (bounding box 932,373,1539,1023), both showing extensive facade destruction, missing sections, and compromised structural integrity. The overall scene depicts two multi-story residential buildings heavily damaged by what appears to be explosive impact, standing amidst overgrown vegetation under a clear sky. The likely functional impact is complete loss of habitability and structural safety for both buildings.
